title: Cross-team projects to live on multiple portfolios
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: KateH1 (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We have large projects that span across multiple teams who all need to track it. They all have their own tasks that belong under one main project and this needs to reflect on all their portfolios, not just one.

What are you trying to achieve

Visibility of a cross team project in multiple portfolios instead of having to create it in each individual one.

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @KateH1 ,

You can try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app.

It allows you to create a master board with tasks from multiple boards and sync changes, updates+replies in real-time.

171920×960 163 KB

What You Can Do -

Add the SAME ITEM ON MULTIPLE BOARDS with live sync and full context

Sync UPDATES + REPLIES in real time for items and subitems

Set up automations like “When status changes to something, mirror item to target board and group”

Create a Master Board with items/subitems from multiple boards

Add a subitem from one board as a main item on another board

Keep your boards clean and connected — no Mirror Columns or Connect Boards needed

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co or book a meeting here
